title: star wars LightSabers
description: This resourcepack adds lightsabers from Star Wars
body: 11 Lightsabers from Star Wars 1. A lightsaber inspired by Galen Marek's lightsaber. 2. A lightsaber similar to Count Dooku's lightsaber. 3. A stormtrooper's lightsaber. 4. Satele Shan's double-bladed lightsaber. 5. A two-handed lightsaber inspired by Cal Kestis's lightsaber. 6. A lightsaber similar to Ezra Bridger's lightsaber. 7. jedi knight lightsaber 8. Jedi Consular Lightsaber 9. one of Grievous' lightsabers 10. Mace Windu's Lightsaber 11. Qui-Gon Jinn's Lightsaber
